propositions: The final milestone of enabling identity.require_authenticated=true was deferred and never executed, leaving the store mostly unsigned.
Local worktrees/sessions lack a persistent signing key, so nearly all events are unsigned.
GitHub Actions reconcile-bridge writes unsigned events because REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY secret is unset.
Gerrit-side signing landed in code but was never confirmed on the deployed VM (canary force-closed).
Every writer surface must produce signed, verified events before the enforcement flag is flipped so the gate never goes red.
identity.enforce_since must be pinned to the cutover commit so pre-boundary events are grandfathered while post-boundary unsigned events fail.
